FUNCTION
FUNCTION
FUNCTION
FUNCTION
FUNCTION

We design structures that endure — rooted in material truth, driven by spatial intelligence, and resolved through rigorous craft. Architecture as discipline. As permanence.

View Our Work How We Work
Scroll
Residential Architecture Commercial Design Interior Environments Urban Planning Adaptive Reuse Material Research Cultural Institutions Private Commissions Residential Architecture Commercial Design Interior Environments Urban Planning Adaptive Reuse Material Research Cultural Institutions Private Commissions
Our Philosophy

We believe architecture is the art of restraint — where silence speaks as loudly as structure, and where every subtraction reveals something essential.

01

Material Honesty

Every surface tells the truth of its making. We work with concrete, timber, steel, and stone not as finishes but as structure — letting materials speak without apology or ornament.

02

Spatial Intelligence

A room is not measured in square footage but in the quality of light it holds at 4pm, the way sound moves through it, the sequence by which a body comes to understand it over time.

03

Enduring Form

We design for decades, not seasons. Every project undergoes rigorous structural, climatic, and contextual analysis to ensure it belongs — completely and without compromise — to its place.

Selected
Work

2019 — 2024
Residential · 2023 The Voss Residence
Explore Project
Cultural · 2022 Oslo Tower
Commercial · 2024 Meridian HQ
Interior · 2023 Kira Atelier
84 Projects Built Across 14 countries, from Tokyo to Oslo.
10+ Years Practice A decade of uncompromised spatial work.
23 Awards Including the Pritzker Architecture Prize.
6 Studios Berlin, London, New York, Seoul, São Paulo, Sydney.

Bespoke
Services

All capabilities
01 — Residential

Private Residences & Retreats

From compact urban apartments to expansive rural compounds, we design private homes that grow from their landscape and reflect the lives lived within them. Each commission begins with listening.

Explore Service
02 — Commercial

Commercial Architecture & Workplaces

We design offices, hospitality venues, and retail environments that balance civic ambition with human scale — spaces where work, meeting, and dwelling intersect with purpose and clarity.

Explore Service
03 — Interiors

Interior Environments & Detailing

Our interior practice moves from large spatial gestures down to the grain of a timber handle. We specify, detail, and source every material — treating the interior as architecture continued inward.

Explore Service
04 — Adaptive Reuse

Heritage Conversion & Renovation

We approach existing buildings with deep respect and controlled confidence — preserving the memory of a structure while injecting new life, new light, and new relevance for contemporary use.

Explore Service
05 — Institutional

Cultural & Civic Institutions

Museums, libraries, schools, and civic halls carry the weight of collective memory. We design public buildings with a sense of occasion — structures that earn their place in the urban fabric.

Explore Service
06 — Research

Material Research & Consulting

Our material research lab investigates emerging construction methods, sustainable systems, and experimental finishes — offering consulting to practices and manufacturers navigating the frontier of built form.

Explore Service
MATERIAL
MATERIAL
MATERIAL
MATERIAL
MATERIAL

We treat every surface as a decision — each texture, joint, and finish the result of considered choice rather than convention.

How We
Work

Every FORM.STUDIO project follows a rigorous, client-centred methodology — built from the ground of deep research and refined through iterative dialogue.

01

Discovery & Brief

We begin by listening — to you, to the site, to its history and its horizon. The brief emerges through structured conversations and site investigations, not assumption.

2–4 Weeks
02

Concept & Spatial Strategy

From the brief, we develop a spatial argument — a clear, defensible idea that will guide every subsequent decision. Presented as drawings, models, and written rationale.

4–8 Weeks
03

Design Development

The concept is tested and refined at increasing levels of resolution — from massing to plan to section to detail. Every decision traced back to the original spatial argument.

8–16 Weeks
04

Technical Documentation

We produce exhaustive construction documentation — specifications, details, and schedules that leave no ambiguity on site. Precision on paper is precision in concrete.

6–12 Weeks
05

Construction & Site Presence

Our architects remain present throughout construction — conducting site inspections, reviewing mock-ups, and making real-time decisions that protect the integrity of the design.

Variable
FORM.STUDIO

Architecture and spatial design rooted in material honesty, structural clarity, and enduring form.
